expectations.text: The report says the FooSDK version is missing or unclear.
expectations.evidence:
STACK DETECTED

OFFICIAL SOURCES

UNVERIFIED
- I could not verify any recommended auth middleware pattern from official docs.
- Do not guess a pattern until the FooSDK version is known.
